productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Silver Casual Shoes
description: For all you adventurous women out there, here's one fabulous shoe that'll be a perfect companion in your adventure trips. The timberland TMA All Mountain Low Circuit shoe is made of tough material and a grippy outsole to help you stay safe on undulating terrain. Upper Heavily meshed upper made of Gore-Tex for breathable comfort and waterproofing Strategically pla ced synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structure Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned tongue and collar for all-day comfort Complete padded fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Ortholite footbed with perforations for sweat-free all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Haul loop for hanging the boots from a backpack Midsole Phylon midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfort Outsole Durable green rubber outsole with lugs strategically placed throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction Scooped heel with dynamic traction lines for ease of movement Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
